examples: Ferguson should be basking in the afterglow of his successes.
I loathed myself for coming so soon, in the afterglow of my man-of-the-world fantasies.
We back so far up we're finally seeing a containment around us -- the afterglow of the Big Bang.
This longer wavelength afterglow can last days and Swift alerts ground-based observatories to join the spectacle.
"We're still in the afterglow" of "The Hunger Games, " he said, before quickly correcting himself.
